channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Transformer] sglang
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 24,885 | Forks: 4,950

item.title: [Transformer] fish-speech
item.description:
📈 Rank: #9 → #8 (↑1)
SOTA Open Source TTS
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 28,665 | Forks: 2,403

item.title: [Transformer] mmdetection
item.description:
📈 Rank: #8 → #7 (↑1)
OpenMMLab Detection Toolbox and Benchmark
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 32,526 | Forks: 9,845

item.title: [Transformer] pytorch-image-models
item.description:
📈 Rank: #7 → #6 (↑1)
The largest collection of PyTorch image encoders / backbones. Including train, eval, inference, export scripts, and pretrained weights -- ResNet, ResNeXT, EfficientNet, NFNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), MobileNetV4, MobileNet-V3 & V2, RegNet, DPN, CSPNet, Swin Transformer, MaxViT, CoAtNet, ConvNeXt, and more
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 36,537 | Forks: 5,141

item.title: [Transformer] minGPT
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in Transformer
A minimal PyTorch re-implementation of the OpenAI GPT (Generative Pretrained Transformer) training
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 23,960 | Forks: 3,167

item.title: [LLM] firecrawl
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data
Language: TypeScript
Category: LLM Stars: 96,639 | Forks: 6,558

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 94,778 → 98,891 (+4,113)

Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 98,891 | Forks: 12,895
